'''C++''' is a programming language. [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/C%2B%2B See Wikipedia about it]

It is the main language we have [[Development|used]] to [[OpenLieroX source code|code]] [[OpenLieroX]].

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721122457/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/C%2B%2B -->
